description: Baseline: default config, no reranking, no expansion
Exp 1: enable heuristic reranking (REVERTED - temporal dropped to 23%)
Exp 2: min_relevance 0.1 (noise - config doesnt affect search() path)
Exp 3: full hybrid pipeline for /v1/retrieve (REVERTED - accuracy+latency regressed)
Exp 4: top_k=150 + temporal fallback (+4.7% recall, +12.5% knowledge-update)
Exp 5: content re-query (REVERTED - +recall but -accuracy, 2x latency, noise dilution)
Exp 6: 40 context chunks to LLM (NEW BEST +4% accuracy, all weak types improved)
Exp 7: top_k=200 + 60 chunks (REVERTED - too much context dilutes signal)
Exp 8: gpt-4o answer model (NEW BEST +10% accuracy, 2 types at 100%)
Exp 9: query expansion (REVERTED - +recall but -accuracy, 8x latency)
Exp 10: extract-then-reason prompt (+temporal but -knowledge-update)
Exp 11: embedding-3-large 3072d (+recall but -accuracy, score distribution change)
Exp 12: embedding-3-large@1536 Matryoshka (+knowledge but -temporal)
Exp 13: gpt-4o judge (stricter than mini — Exp 8 score is real)
Exp 14: Python session expansion (REGRESSED — full sessions flood context)
Exp 14a: Rust session expansion + facts (REGRESSED — expansion floods context + 4x latency)
Exp 15: Rust fact search only (facts table near-empty, +latency for no gain)
Exp 16: knowledge-aware prompt (temporal 48%, but multi-session crashed)
Exp 17: Python query decomposition (temporal 50%, but hurts simple categories)
Exp 18: Rust decomposition broad (temporal 54% RECORD, but 45/100 trigger too much)
Exp 19: Rust decomposition tightened (61% stale-index, temporal 50%, multi 44%)
Exp 21: decomp + date-text expansion fresh ingest (date-text hurts, removed)
Exp 22: decomp only fresh ingest (still -3% vs Exp 8, decomp reverted)
Exp 23: temporal fallback only (BEST 63%, temporal 50%)
Exp 24: BM25 always-on hybrid (noise dilution, -6.4% vs Exp 23)
Exp 25: BM25 conditional fallback (still below Exp 23)
Exp 26: session-grouped ordering (catastrophic)
Exp 27: NDCG session retrieval (multi-session 48% best, but overall 58%)
Exp 28: date-enriched embeddings (temporal 61.5% RECORD)
Exp 29: full enrichment date+context+facts (context/facts hurt, reverted to date-only)
Exp 30: date-only enrichment validation (61%, temporal high-variance)
Exp 31: LLM memory extraction (recall 67.3% BEST, but memories flood context -accuracy)
Exp 33: date+temporal+statement+BM25 entity (recall 66.2% best, but 640ms latency)
Exp 34: no statement re-query (stale index inflated latency)
Exp 36: chronological assembler (55%, LLM variance low run)
Exp 37: date-prefixed retrieve content (stale index latency)
Exp 38: round-level storage (temporal 58%, multi 44%, but assistant dropped 82%)
Exp 39: round+raw assistant 3x chunks (300GB bloat, reverted to round-only)
Exp 40: round-only validation (298ms p50, temporal 58%, assistant 73%)
Exp 41: BM25 entity fallback score<0.4 (doesn't trigger, scores above threshold)
Exp 26: session-grouped ordering (CATASTROPHIC — top sessions monopolize)
Exp 23: temporal fallback only clean baseline (NEW BEST 63%, temporal 50%)
Exp 17: query decomposition (temporal 50% RECORD, but hurts simple categories)
